# boxer_principal (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `data_json` (String) The principal data in JSON format.
- `schema_id` (String) The schema ID that this principal belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the principal.
